Info

Defines ats_utilities.splash package.

class ats_utilities.splash.ExtInfrastructure(prop: Dict[Any, Any], checker: IATSChecker | None = None, reporter: IATSReporter | None = None, verbose: bool = False)[source]¶

Bases: IExtInfrastructure

Defines class ExtInfrastructure with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for processing hyperlinks for splash screen. API for GitHub information.

It defines:

attributes:
ERRORS - Error checker.
__checker - Error checker.
__reporter - ATSReporter for outputting messages.
__verbose - Enable/Disable verbose option.
__property - Splash property in dict format.
methods:
__init__ - Initials ExtInfrastructure constructor.
get_info_text - Pre-processes info text.
get_issue_text - Pre-processes issue text.
get_author_text - Pre-processes author text.
ERRORS¶

alias of ErrorChecker

_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
get_author_text() → str[source]¶

Pre-processes author text for splash.

Returns:

Hyperlink with author info

Return type:

<str>

Exceptions:

None

get_info_text() → str[source]¶

Pre-processes info text for splash.

Returns:

Hyperlink with info text

Return type:

<str>

Exceptions:

None

get_issue_text() → str[source]¶

Pre-processes issue text for splash.

Returns:

Hyperlink with issue info

Return type:

<str>

Exceptions:

None

methods:
center - Center console line (abstract).

class ats_utilities.splash.ProgressBar(end: int, start: int = 0)[source]¶

Bases: IProgressBar

Defineds class ProgressBar with attribute(s) and method(s). Loads a progressbar as part of splash screen. Progress bar component.

It defines:

attributes:
DEFAULT_BAR_LENGTH - Length of progressbar.
DEFAULT_CHAR_ON - Loaded progress element.
DEFAULT_CHAR_OFF - Unloaded progress element.
__start - Start of level.
__end - End of level.
__bar_length - Progress length.
__level - Progress level.
__plotted - Plotted progress.
__level_chars - Level progress chars.
methods:
__init__ - Initials ProgressBar constructor.
set_level - Sets level of progress.
plot_progress - Plots progress.
set_and_plot - Sets and plots progress.
__del__ - Dunder del method for ProgressBar.
DEFAULT_BAR_LENGTH: int = 60¶
DEFAULT_CHAR_OFF: str = ' '¶
DEFAULT_CHAR_ON: str = '█'¶
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
plot_progress(columns: int) → None[source]¶

Plots progress.

Parameters:

columns (<int>) – Colums for open console session

Exceptions:

None

set_and_plot(level: int, columns: int) → None[source]¶

Sets and plots progress.

Parameters:

  • level (<int>) – Level of progress

  • columns (<int>) – colums for open console session

Exceptions:

None

set_level(level: int) → None[source]¶

Sets level.

Parameters:

level (<int>) – Level of progress

Exceptions:

None

class ats_utilities.splash.Splash(prop: Dict[Any, Any], splash_property: ISplashProperty | None = None, terminal_property: ITerminalProperties | None = None, github: IExtInfrastructure | None = None, ext: IExtInfrastructure | None = None, pb: IProgressBar | None = None, checker: IATSChecker | None = None, reporter: IATSReporter | None = None, verbose: bool = False)[source]¶

Bases: ISplash

Defines class Splash with attribute(s) and method(s). Loads a splash screen info and adds hyperlinks. API splash component.

It defines:

attributes:
ERRORS - Error checker.
__checker - Error checker.
__reporter - ATSReporter for outputting messages.
__verbose - Enable/Disable verbose option.
__splash_property - Splash property checker.
__terminal_property - Terminal properties.
__github - GitHub infrastructure for hyperlinks (used if ‘ats_use_github_infrastructure’ is True).
__ext - Generic external infrastructure for hyperlinks (used if ‘ats_use_github_infrastructure’ is False).
__pb - Progress bar.
methods:
__init__ - Initials Splash constructor.
center - Center console line.
ERRORS¶

alias of ErrorChecker

_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
center(columns: int, additional_shifter: int, text: str | None, verbose: bool = False) → None[source]¶

Center console line.

Parameters:

  • columns (<int>) – Colums for console session

  • additional_shifter (<int>) – Additional shifters

  • text (<Optional[str]>) – Text for console session | None

  • verbose (<bool>) – Enable/Disable verbose option

Exceptions:

ATSTypeError | ATSValueError

class ats_utilities.splash.SplashProperty(prop: Dict[Any, Any], checker: IATSChecker | None = None, reporter: IATSReporter | None = None, verbose: bool = False)[source]¶

Bases: ISplashProperty

Defines class SplashProperty with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for checking splash property. Splash screen property API.

It defines:

attributes:
ERRORS - Error checker.
_EXPECTED_PROP_KEYS - Expected property names.
__checker - Error checker.
__reporter - ATSReporter for outputting messages.
__verbose - Enable/Disable verbose option.
__property - Splash property in dict format.
methods:
__init__ - Initials SplashProperty constructor.
validation - Validates splash property.
ERRORS¶

alias of ErrorChecker

_EXPECTED_PROP_KEYS: List[str] = ['ats_organization', 'ats_repository', 'ats_name', 'ats_logo_path', 'ats_use_github_infrastructure']¶
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
validate(verbose: bool = False) → bool[source]¶

Validates splash property.

Parameters:

verbose (<bool>) – Enable/Disable verbose option

Returns:

True (property ok) else False

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None

class ats_utilities.splash.TerminalProperties(checker: IATSChecker | None = None, reporter: IATSReporter | None = None, verbose: bool = False)[source]¶

Bases: ITerminalProperties

Defines class TerminalProperties with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for getting terminal properties. API for terminal properties.

It defines:

attributes:
ERRORS - Error checker.
__checker - Error checker.
__reporter - ATSReporter for outputting messages.
__verbose - Enable/Disable verbose option.
__window_size - Terminal window size.
methods:
__init__ - Initials TerminalProperties constructor.
ioctl_get_window_size - Gets size for descriptor.
ioctl_for_all_descriptors - Gets size for all descriptors.
size - Gets size of terminal window.
ERRORS¶

alias of ErrorChecker

_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
ioctl_for_all_descriptors(verbose: bool = False) → None[source]¶

Gets size for all descriptors.

Parameters:

verbose (<bool>) – Enable/Disable verbose option

Returns:

True (window size checked) else false

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None

ioctl_get_window_size(file_descriptor: int, verbose: bool = False) → Tuple[Any, ...][source]¶

Gets size for descriptor.

Window size of terminal.
